arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Liverpool's Mo Salah 'holds' Inter Milan talks
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Liverpool star at risk of missing out on Premier League winner's medal and faces race against time before the end of the season
arts.sum: It was a huge weekend for Arne Slot's team, who beat Manchester City 2-0 at the Etihad after Arsenal suffered a shock 1-0 defeat to West Ham at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: “Only thing I want” – Player ‘always committed’ to Liverpool despite exit links
arts.sum: Barcelona have been dragged back into the picture to sign Liverpool’s Luis Díaz after they were previously linked to him. Last Wednesday, El Chiringuito journalist Jose Alvarez Haya reported the forward has been offered to Barcelona. A day later, we covered claims from Spain which stated Díaz doesn’t want to sign a new contract at The post “Only thing I want” – Player ‘always committed’ to Liverpool despite exit links appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arne Slot is now questioning whether he still needs Liverpool's £30m signing at Anfield next season
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Liverpool have not ruled out keeping Alisson next season which could mean Giorgi Mamardashvili’s arrival at Anfield is delayed. Liverpool signed...

arts.ttl: Man Utd open talks for ‘new Virgil van Dijk’
arts.sum: Manchester United have opened talks to sign RB Leipzig defensive star Castello Lukeba. That is according to Sacha Tovalieri, who reports that United have opened negotiations with the entourage of Lukeba ahead of the summer transfer market.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Euro giants keen on signing Liverpool star who’s free to leave
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are on the hunt for a new striker next summer and one of their transfer targets is Liverpool forward Darwin Nunez. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Nunez is greatly admired by Atletico Madrid manager Diego Simeone as he looks to make changes to his attack. The […] The post Revealed: Euro giants keen on signing Liverpool star who’s free to leave appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: 'Mission' planned for Virgil van Dijk replacement
arts.sum: Nevertheless, with Van Dijk set to turn 34 in the summer, Arne Slot’s team need a succession plan for a player who remains at the peak of his game but is surely in his final years at the very elite level Liverpool are operating at. Liverpool have plotted their strategy to find the replacement for Virgil van Dijk, according to football transfer news reporter Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Liverpool drop Newcastle United team news hint as Darwin Nunez offers Arne Slot response
arts.sum: Liverpool will be hoping that they can follow on from their win over Manchester City against Newcastle

arts.ttl: “They try to help” – Sandro Tonali on Newcastle United fans and pivotal factory visit
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali has done well for Newcastle United this season, cementing himself as a favourite with the club’s fans. He’s played 31 times in all competitions, scoring three times and assisting twice. Tonali has grown into a defensive midfield role, while also playing further forward sometimes. arts.ttl: Newcastle United must overcome 'horrible' Liverpool rallying cry as Virgil van Dijk gets tough
arts.sum: Newcastle United will have to combat an enthused Anfield home crowd when they visit Merseyside on Wednesday evening, with Liverpool club captain Virgil van Dijk urging supporters to make the stadium atmosphere 'horrible' for their opposition. Should Van Dijk's rallying cry to the home support be put into action, it promises to be an even trickier evening for Eddie Howe's men.
